AccountChannelReadiness.title: AccountChannelReadiness
AccountChannelReadiness.description: One channel's readiness summary on an account card.

AddChannelsRequest.title: AddChannelsRequest
AddChannelsRequest.description: Raw user input — one or many links/usernames, newline- or comma-separated.

AssignAccountRequest.title: AssignAccountRequest
AssignAccountRequest.description: Assign an account to a campaign (the campaign id is the route path param).

CampaignCreate.title: CampaignCreate
CampaignCreate.description: User input to open a campaign — the product mention lives in the prompt.

CampaignList.title: CampaignList
CampaignList.description: Wrapper so callers never receive a raw list (non-negotiable #2).

ChannelLinkOutcome.title: ChannelLinkOutcome
ChannelLinkOutcome.description:
Result of attaching a channel to a campaign.

``already_assigned`` means the channel is the active target of another campaign
(the repository's uniqueness guard). The service returns this instead of letting
``ChannelAlreadyAssignedError`` reach the UI, so features never catch internals (#2).

LinkChannelRequest.title: LinkChannelRequest
LinkChannelRequest.description: Attach a channel to a campaign (the campaign id is the route path param).

LogEntry.title: LogEntry
LogEntry.description: One row of the ``logs`` SQLite table.

NeurocommentAccountCard.title: NeurocommentAccountCard
NeurocommentAccountCard.description: Per-account card in the work view: limits, health, last activity.

NeurocommentBoard.title: NeurocommentBoard
NeurocommentBoard.description: Bulk read model for the work view of one campaign.

NeurocommentChannelRow.title: NeurocommentChannelRow
NeurocommentChannelRow.description: Per-channel row: aggregate status derived from readiness + linked group.

NeurocommentRuntimeStatus.title: NeurocommentRuntimeStatus
NeurocommentRuntimeStatus.description:
Fleet-wide runtime state for the page's running indicator + live animation.

``running`` is the single source of truth the UI animates on: the engine is
one fleet listener (not per-campaign), so the persisted listener account id
being set means the engine is live. ``active_channels`` is the size of the
watch set across all active campaigns (what the listener actually watches).

ProxyCreate.title: ProxyCreate
ProxyCreate.description: Operator input when adding a proxy to the pool.

ProxyRead.title: ProxyRead
ProxyRead.description: A pool proxy as shown on the Accounts page (masked credentials).

StartNeurocommentRequest.title: StartNeurocommentRequest
StartNeurocommentRequest.description: Start the fleet listener on the given account.

TdataImportResult.title: TdataImportResult
TdataImportResult.description:
Outcome of one :func:`services.accounts.sessions.import_account_tdata` call.

Wrapping the imported accounts in a model (instead of returning a raw
``list[AccountRead]``) keeps the service boundary Pydantic-only, leaves room
to add per-import metadata (counts, partial-failure summaries) without
breaking every call site, and matches the convention used by ``list_accounts``
and other multi-row reads.

WarmingAccountState.title: WarmingAccountState
WarmingAccountState.description: One account's warming status, rendered as a kanban card.

WarmingBoardState.title: WarmingBoardState
WarmingBoardState.description: Everything the warming page renders in one poll tick.

WarmingChannel.title: WarmingChannel
WarmingChannel.description: One channel the warming engine can join / read / react in.

WarmingReadiness.title: WarmingReadiness
WarmingReadiness.description:
Pre-start verdict for an account: can it safely begin warming?

``reasons`` is empty iff ``ready`` is True — each entry is a short,
human-readable blocker (``"session new"``, ``"no proxy"``, ``"no channels"``).

WarmingSettings.title: WarmingSettings
WarmingSettings.description: Masked, UI-facing warming settings — never carries the raw Gemini key.

WarmingSettingsUpdate.title: WarmingSettingsUpdate
WarmingSettingsUpdate.description:
Caller-supplied settings change from the UI.

``gemini_api_key`` semantics: ``None`` leaves the stored key untouched, an
empty string clears it, any other value replaces it. Same applies to
``gemini_model`` — ``None`` keeps current value, non-empty overrides.
An explicit ``clear_gemini_key`` flag is provided so the UI can clear the
stored key without ambiguity.

WarmingSummary.title: WarmingSummary
WarmingSummary.description: Fleet-level roll-up shown at the top of the warming page.
